meta.setting: Jefferson State frontier, beginning in French Gulch

generation_prompt.task: Generate the Initialization familiar/rules page for the 1899 Jefferson frontier rules packet.
generation_guidance: This is a table-facing procedure page, not technical documentation.
Use examples and rule language only in the generated markdown, not in this prompt file.
Keep mechanics legible for solo and group play.
Tie procedures to frontier objects: ledgers, maps, playing cards, trail signs, strongboxes, notices, coffee, weather, and debt.
generation_prompt.boutique_direction: Make this feel like setting a campaign table with a pencil, a deck of rumors, a county map, and a cup of bad coffee; practical first, poetic second.

style_constraints.era: All generated content belongs to 1899 and should feel period-grounded without becoming a history lecture.
style_constraints.voice: Use a frontier oral-history voice: weathered, specific, practical, and slightly mythic, but never fantasy-storybook.
style_constraints.typography: Generated markdown will later be shown with Rye for headings and Smokum for body copy; write headings that can carry that bold western display style.
style_constraints.rules_lore_balance: Every page should be useful at the table: lore creates hooks, rules create choices, and neither should read like technical documentation.
style_constraints.continuity: French Gulch is the starting pressure point; roads, claims, people, debts, weather, rumor, law, and company power should radiate outward from there.

avoid: do not write finished page prose inside this prompt file
do not include completed lore paragraphs, sample inscriptions, dialogue, or final rule text
do not mention any source packet, template packet, or reference project by name
do not include engine, hardware, runtime, profiling, build, deployment, or implementation details
do not include modern slang, modern technology, fantasy races, magic systems, or developer-facing commentary
do not use placeholder filler such as TBD, lorem ipsum, or generic western flavor without a playable purpose
self_check: The generated markdown follows the required section order exactly.
The generated page contains real usable lore/rules, but this JSON prompt contains no finished page prose.
The generated page stays in 1899 Jefferson State and begins from or points back to French Gulch when appropriate.
The generated page contains no technical engine or hardware material.
The generated page never names any reference/source packet.
